creator: adam.mccann@videogamer.com
text:
Attempted to install x11-fonts/webfonts, one of the dependencies is x11/xcb-util, and for compiling that it needs version 3.0.4 of gperf, but the latest port if 3.0.3.

Compile fails

gperf --output-file atoms.c atoms.gperf
gperf: unrecognized option `--output-file'
Usage: gperf [-cCdDef[num]F<initializers>GhH<hashname>i<init>Ijk<keys>K<keyname>lL<language>nN<function name>ors<size>S<switches>tTvW<wordlistname>Z<class name>7] [input-file]
Try `gperf --help' for more information.
gmake[1]: *** [atoms.c] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11/xcb-util/work/xcb-util-0.3.6/atom'
gmake: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
*** Error code 1

How-To-Repeat: Attempt install of x11-fonts/webfonts port
